response_constraints: Do not issue the update until the current summary has been retrieved.
Preserve the shelving order and November 2 target while replacing the undecided color.

stages.purpose: Retrieve the renovation summary before resolving the wall-color item.

arguments.summary: Reading room renovation: shelving order placed; reopening target November 2; warm white wall color approved.

stages.purpose: Update the recursive summary with the approved color and preserved schedule facts.

state_assertions: The recursive summary says warm white wall color approved.
The shelving order and November 2 reopening target remain in the summary.

prompt: Retrieve my reading-room renovation summary, add that warm white is the approved wall color, and retain the shelving order and November 2 reopening target.

tool_results.summary: Reading room renovation: shelving order placed; reopening target November 2; wall color undecided.
